notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
Source directly states 巨阳仙尊暗中传令给所有的超级黄金部族，全力接触并且招揽此人. This is a secret order known only to 巨阳仙尊 and the receiving super golden tribes, not known to 方源. Atomic fact, well-supported.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows observable actions (巨阳仙尊暗中传令招揽方源, 巨阳仙尊投出信道仙蛊) but the motives behind these actions are ambiguous. While one could infer 巨阳仙尊 wants to recruit 方源 or communicate with 星宿仙尊, the seed does not directly support a clear inferred motive beyond the observed actions. The observed behavior is visible but the underlying intent is not explicitly stated in the source facts.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed primarily focuses on individual actors (巨阳仙尊, 星宿仙尊, 方源, 鹤风扬) as venerables/persons, not collective factions with concrete stakes. 超级黄金部族 is mentioned as a target of 巨阳仙尊's order to recruit 方源, but no concrete stake, reaction, or pressure from the collective itself is shown in the seed facts. 天庭 appears as an organization but only in relation to individual transactions and漠视 attitude, without showing collective pressure or stake. 武庸 is an individual. No named family, clan, or group in the seed has a clear collective stake that would generate a faction pressure candidate.
IF export filter quarantined 10 legacy old-schema branches.
